text: Welcome to the community, helper_alex! You’re approved as a moderator. Please review the mod guidelines and say hi in the #welcome channel.
Welcome to the community, mentor_lina! You’re approved as a mentor. Please review the mentor guidelines and opt into the mentor matching program.
Welcome to the community, guide_sam! You’re approved as an event helper. Check the events playbook and join the next planning thread.
Welcome to the community, newbie_kim! You’re approved as a member. Start with the onboarding guide and introduce yourself in #welcome.
